v1alpha1.description: KusoProject is the top-level grouping for one product.

alwaysOn.description:
When true, every service in this project runs with
sleep.enabled=false regardless of per-service sleep
config. Lets a project opt out of scale-to-zero
globally — useful when cold-start latency is
unacceptable (low-traffic but latency-sensitive
APIs, background processors that must always be
listening).

baseDomain.description: Domain under which auto-generated service hostnames are emitted.

namespace.description:
Optional execution namespace for this project's child
resources (services, environments, addons, builds,
plus their per-service Secrets). The KusoProject CR
itself always lives in the server's home namespace;
this field controls only child routing. Empty = home.

placement.description:
Project-default node-pinning policy. Services
without their own placement inherit it; new
environments derived from a service inherit the
service's effective placement (with project as
fallback). Empty = schedule anywhere.

labels.description:
Node-label matchers (AND across keys). The
server prefixes them with kuso.sislelabs.com/
behind the scenes so user-typed labels are
kept in a separate namespace from kube's.

nodes.description:
Specific hostnames the workload may schedule
onto. Combines with labels via AND: a node
must match all labels AND be in this list
(when set), or match all labels (when empty).
